sections.content:
World model update: RIGHT on red path moves block 3 columns per action (vs 6 on white corridor). After RIGHT x4 from cols 14-18 on red path, block at cols 26-30. Need more RIGHT actions to reach cols 38-42.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Block at rows 8-12, cols 26-30.
# Go DOWN x2 to rows 20-24, cols 26-30 (on red path).
# Then RIGHT x4 to reach cols 38-42.
# Then UP x3 to reach rows 8-12, cols 38-42 (red square).

result = action(['DOWN', 'DOWN'])
print(f"After DOWN x2: step={current_frame.step}")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blue_block = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
print(f"Blue block: {[(n['boundary']) for n in blue_block]}")

result = action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
print(f"After RIGHT x4: step={current_frame.step}")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blue_block = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
print(f"Blue block: {[(n['boundary']) for n in blue_block]}")

# Check if we reached cols 38-42
if blue_block and blue_block[0]['boundary'][0][1] == 38:
    print("Reached cols 38-42! Now UP x3 to red square.")
    result = action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP'])
    print(f"After UP x3: step={current_frame.step}")
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    blue_block = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
    print(f"Blue block: {[(n['boundary']) for n in blue_block]}")
    
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('done'):
        print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
    else:
        print("Level not complete. Try SPACE at red square.")
        result = action(['SPACE'])
        print(f"After SPACE: step={current_frame.step}")
        print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")
else:
    print(f"Not at cols 38-42. Block at cols {blue_block[0]['boundary'][0][1]}-{blue_block[0]['boundary'][1][1] if blue_block else 'N/A'}")
    # Continue RIGHT
    result = action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
    print(f"After RIGHT x4 more: step={current_frame.step}")
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    blue_block = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
    print(f"Blue block: {[(n['boundary']) for n in blue_block]}")

hud_blue = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['boundary'][0][0] == 63 and n['pixels'] > 10]
hud_gray = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w' and n['boundary'][0][0] == 63]
print(f"HUD blue: {[(n['pixels']) for n in hud_blue]}")
print(f"HUD gray: {[(n['pixels']) for n in hud_gray]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
